name: Forbion European Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: Forbion European Acquisition Corp. Unit is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. A unit typically includes a share of common stock and a fraction of a warrant to purchase additional shares. Forbion European Acquisition Corp. seeks to identify and partner with a high-growth company.
